title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 275.130 - Authority to reissue and resell shares purchased
text:
275.130.  Authority to reissue and resell shares purchased. — Every such association shall have power, and is hereby authorized, when it shall purchase any of its shares, to reissue and resell such shares upon the same terms and conditions as in the first instance.
(RSMo 1939 § 14376) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12718
